Revision 614b4be38f470c08d92c0d1474a22f3820856e46 from 7ed98d52ddbe5ed8b9904b50cf8fd61b3becb5de - mame-linux-clang-614b4be38f470c08d92c0d1474a22f3820856e46 - generated 2026-07-21T18:40:14.612368+00:00
-cpu/drcbec.cpp: Fixed overflow flag calculation for ADDC. * This is a case of GitHub #15043. SUBB doesn't seem to be affected. -taito/capr1.cpp, taito/capr2.cpp: Use most widely accepted release dates.
